deployment.shipmentStart: Manual start via iShip after pre-departure checklist
deployment.sensorInterrupts: Temperature monitoring via ambient light sensor (door-state detection)
deployment.deviceType: BSF devices — assigned per shipment via iShip
deployment.lightConfirmed: Dark = door closed (loaded), Light = door open

successCriteria: Prevent temperature excursions during pharmaceutical cold chain shipments, with particular emphasis on pre-departure readiness validation

insights.text: Pre-departure phase is highest-risk for preventable temperature excursions
SSO failures affect all users — immediate escalation required
Temperature monitoring only valid after: device loaded + door shut (dark) + settlement time complete

expansionOpportunities: Automation enhancements for predictive/preventive RADAR capabilities
Expanded event type coverage beyond current 9 types

notes: Enterprise healthcare customer using Decklar for cold chain temperature monitoring across pharmaceutical shipments. Account is operationally active with fully documented end-to-end monitoring flow. 9 defined RADAR event types active. Platform modules: RADAR, BeeCentral (24x7 Risk Monitoring), iShip CARE. Focus on pre-departure readiness where historically more preventable excursions occur.

extraFields.escalationPath: CARE Analyst → CARE Lead → Engineering → CSM → Customer
extraFields.settlementTimeLogic: Temperature readings valid only after: device inside container + door shut (dark ambient light) + settlement time complete
extraFields.ssoDomain: Configured for McKesson — verify user email domain matches for access issues
